description: From the manufacturer AV:Link | Universal Television Remote Control Universal Remote Control, designed with tough, splashproof, and wipe-clean materials, making it ideal for maintaining sterility in environments such as hospitals, schools, and hotels. This innovative remote is instantly compatible with most Samsung, LG, and Sony TVs straight out of the box and can also be programmed to work with many other brands. Perfect for replacing lost or broken remotes, it offers comprehensive control over most major TV modes and functions. Powered by 2x AAA batteries (not supplied), this rugged remote is built to withstand the demands of both home and business applications. With an IPX3 rating, it ensures durability and reliability in various settings. PRODUCT FEATURES: Designed for sterile environments such as hospitals, schools and hotels Works out of the box for LG, Samsung and Sony TVs and can be programmed for many other brands Ideal to replace lost or broken remote controls Operates most major control modes and functions Uses 2x AAA batteries (not supplied) NOTE: may not work with some models of smart TV SPECIFICATION: IP rating IPX3 Batteries 2x AAA (not supplied) Dimensions 180 x 48 x 20mm Weight 75g BOX CONTAINS: Rugged remote control User guide and code list
